topStories.description: March 26 hearing will be second court appearance since Maduro's January 3 abduction by US military.

topStories.title: Iran to Lebanon: Four million people displaced by US-Israeli war
topStories.description: Three million Iranians and at least a million Lebanese have been forced from their homes because of US-Israeli attacks.

topStories.title: Sony-Honda JV Drops Afeela EV Project After Honda's Strategy Change
topStories.description: The Sony-Honda Afeela 1, an electric sedan intended for launch in the USA later this year, will not go into series production.

topStories.title: 'Better get serious soon': Trump warns Iran, says 'negotiators are very different and strange'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Thursday (local time) warned Iran to ‘get serious soon’ regarding a deal with Washington, adding that if it gets too late, 'there will be no turning back.'

topStories.title: "We Are VIPs, Can't Stand In Queue": Karnataka MLAs Want IPL Tickets
topStories.description: Leader of Opposition, BJP's R Ashoka, targeted KSCA. "We have given them 16.32 acres at a nominal price, but they charge us thousands for match tickets.

topStories.title: ‘Five Nights at Epstein’s’ Game Goes Viral at US School Campuses
topStories.description: Merve Lapus’s 13-year-old daughter told her dad she was horrified: This month, whenever her teacher stepped out of the room, kids in the class used their devices to play a new online game called Five Nights at Epstein’s.

topStories.description: Iran will play two friendly matches in Turkiye as they prepare for the FIFA World Cup in the US, Canada and Mexico.

dailyNews.title: How will the UK respond to US court verdict on social media?
dailyNews.description: Will the decision of a Los Angeles jury have an impact on the UK government as it considers potential future regulations on social media, writes the BBC's political editor.

dailyNews.title: Venezuela’s Maduro set to appear in US court months after abduction
dailyNews.description: The Venezuelan leader, who is accused of plotting to traffic cocaine, denies all charges as part of an imperialist plot.

dailyNews.title: Paige Spiranac offers crucial golf tips for busty women
dailyNews.description: Paige Spiranac just wants to help. The famous golf influencer posted a video trying to help big-breasted women with their swing game on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Israel says Iranian leader who ordered Strait of Hormuz closure killed in targeted strike
dailyNews.description: Israel has eliminated Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy Commander Alireza Tangsiri in a strike, Israel's Minister of Defense Israel Katz indicated.

dailyNews.title: Cornyn counters Paxton with wave of GOP endorsements as party warns critical Texas seat at risk
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, has received a slate of 17 new endorsements from Texas Republicans in the latest development in the bitter primary runoff battle between him Ken Paxton.

dailyNews.title: America 250 organizers unveil sweeping plans for the country's historic birthday celebration
dailyNews.description: America 250 organizers unveiled plans for a Times Square ball drop on July 3 and nationwide block parties on July 4 to mark the country's 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie breaks down over possibility her mom was targeted because of her fame, apologizes to family
dailyNews.description: Savannah Guthrie apologized to her family over the possibility that her mother’s disappearance is somehow related to her fame and high-profile position as "Today" co-anchor.

dailyNews.title: Trump tells 'strange' Iranian negotiators to 'get serious soon' or 'it won't be pretty'
dailyNews.description: Iranian negotiators must "get serious" about a deal to end the war, President Donald Trump warned in a Truth Social post, threatening "no turning back."

dailyNews.title: Fetterman urges fellow Democrats to 'do the right thing' as government shutdown takes toll on workers
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Fetterman urges fellow Democrats to end the partial government shutdown, calling it fundamentally wrong and demanding they put country ahead of party.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie tells 'Today' that mother Nancy's back door was 'propped open' in new interview
dailyNews.description: Savannah Guthrie revealed Thursday that her mother Nancy's doors were propped open and discussed the blood found on her doorstep during a new interview.

topStories.title: Number of immigrants in border communities plunges thanks to Trump crackdown
topStories.description: U.S. city growth slowed in 2025, with border towns like Laredo and Yuma affected most as immigration dropped under President Donald Trump, Census data shows.

topStories.title: Trump’s Threats to Europe Put Its Leaders in a Double Bind Over Iran
topStories.description: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.

topStories.title: Republicans in Congress Fret Over Trump Administration’s Handling of Iran War
topStories.description: G.O.P. lawmakers who have given the Trump administration wide latitude to wage war with no congressional input are growing frustrated as officials offer little detail about ground troops, cost or timeline.

dailyNews.title: Trump Calls for Law Cracking Down on Crime and ‘Rogue Judges’
dailyNews.description: Ahead of the midterms, President Trump told a Republican gathering that he wants to go after repeat offenders and “rogue judges that are criminals.”

dailyNews.title: Trump to Delay Nominating New C.D.C. Director
dailyNews.description: The administration has yet to find a candidate who aligns with Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s agenda while avoiding his unpopular stance on vaccines.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Military Kills 4 People in Boat Strike in Caribbean
dailyNews.description: At least 163 people have been killed in the Trump administration’s campaign against suspected drug smuggling.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Investors Target Foes of Clean Energy, Seeking Revenge
dailyNews.description: Renewable energy leaders said their industry got “rolled” in President Trump’s tax bill. Now they’re fighting back, starting in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran to accept defeat as Israel kills another top commander
dailyNews.description: Trump warns Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late," as Israel says it's killed the Iranian commander behind the Strait of Hormuz closure.

dailyNews.title: Tensions rise as lawmakers call for more details on Trump administration's Iran war strategy
dailyNews.description: President Trump is facing pushback from both parties over the Iran war. Much of the tension appears to be centered on the possibility of sending U.S. troops into Iran and what that would look like. House Armed Services committee chair Rep. Mike Rogers said lawmakers are "just not getting enough answers." Ed O'Keefe reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran rejects U.S. proposal to end war as Trump claims Iranian leaders want to make deal
dailyNews.description: As strikes continue, Iran has rejected a proposal from the U.S. to end the war. But on Wednesday, President Trump repeated his claim that Iran's leaders wanted to make a deal. Holly Williams reports.

dailyNews.title: White House turns down Elon Musk's offer to pay TSA workers during DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: In a post on X Saturday, Musk offered to pay the salaries of TSA workers during the DHS shutdown.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump will "unleash hell" if Iran doesn't make deal
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says talks with Tehran are ongoing hours after Iran's state media said the regime rejected Trump administration proposals.

dailyNews.title: Trump official refers New York AG Letitia James for prosecution again
dailyNews.description: A Trump administration official has made new criminal referrals against New York Attorney General Letitia James to federal prosecutors in Miami and Chicago for two cases of possible homeowner's insurance fraud, sources told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranian negotiators 'better get serious soon, before it is too late'
dailyNews.description: Trump's comments come amid ongoing confusion over whether the U.S. and Iran have held negotiations over ending the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Justices Barrett, Gorsuch ‘sicken me’ after Supreme Court tariff ruling
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump did not have authority under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to impose tariffs.
